name: Quick Cheese Biscuits
recipeInstructions:
1. In a bowl, stir the biscuit mix, milk and cheese just until moistened.
2. Drop by tablespoon onto an ungreased baking sheet.
3. Mix butter and garlic powder; brush over biscuits.
4. Bake at 475°F for 8 to 10 minutes or until golden brown. Serve warm.
